purpose: Recover operator's stuck shielded slot on the JanusFlow EVM proxy.
context: Overnight smoke tests pre-loaded a commitment under the operator's COA, but the corresponding blinding factor was lost, so the next shieldedTransfer's C_old check could never match the stored commitment. The slot was unusable until adminResetSlot wiped it.

operator.note: The original brief used 0xc65395858a38d8ff, which is a MAINNET address and is rejected by the Flow testnet REST API ('address c65395858a38d8ff is invalid for chain flow-testnet'). The actual stuck operator on testnet is testnet-claucondor 0x7599043aea001283, whose COA 0xb7557ee5d4a32d06 carried the non-identity Pedersen point before this reset.

transaction.command: flow transactions send transactions/admin_reset_slot.cdc 0x7599043aea001283 --signer openjanus-flow --network testnet --gas-limit 9999

signal: Operator can now wrap fresh FLOW on testnet-claucondor without rotating wallet — slot is identity (0, 1) so any new commitment will be the first link of a brand-new blinding chain.
